title: AAP Delegation Assertion claim set (AAP-SPEC section 5.3)
description: Claims of the DA: the CGT claim set plus the RFC 8693 delegation members. `sub` is the delegatee, `act.sub` the delegating agent (nesting `act` expresses a chain, innermost first, per RFC 8693 section 4.1), `max_depth` bounds further delegation, `delegator_atx` embeds the delegator's ATX hash for the audit trail (AAP-SPEC section 5.2). The delegatee scope MUST be a subset of the delegator's scope; subsetting is enforced by the minting broker and re-checked by verifiers — the schema pins presence and form, not the subset relation. Self-contained: duplicates the CGT members rather than $ref-ing them so verification never requires reference resolution.
